Social Features.description: Controls for Nexus social platform features

social_enabled.description: Master toggle for all social features (feed, threads, follows, DM)

feed_enabled.description: Enable the Feed/Threads tab in the bottom navigation

semantic_search_enabled.description: Enable Vertex AI Vector Search for semantic thread/user search

media_pipeline_enabled.description: Enable Cloud Transcoder + CDN media pipeline for video uploads

premium_enabled.description: Enable premium subscription and paywall UI

max_free_messages_per_day.description: Maximum AI chat messages per day for free tier users

Experiments.description: A/B tests and gradual rollout flags

ab_test_new_home.description: A/B test: show redesigned home screen with social integration

maintenance_mode.description: Show maintenance banner and disable write operations

version.description: Wave 9D: Initial feature flags for Nexus social platform rollout
